languages.text: "Я пришел за вашим артефактом и требую, чтобы вы немедленно передали его мне".
"I have come for your artefact, and I demand that you hand it over immediately."
languages.original_text: "Я пришел за вашим артефактом и требую, чтобы вы немедленно передали его мне".

traits.locale_text: "I have come for your artefact, and I demand that you hand it over immediately."
"I have come for your artefact, and I demand that you hand it over immediately."
"I have come for your artefact, and I demand that you hand it over immediately."

languages.text: “我是来拿你那件造物的，我命令你立刻把它交出来。”
languages.original_text: "I have come for your artefact, and I demand that you hand it over immediately."

traits.locale_text: “我是来拿你那件造物的，我命令你立刻把它交出来。”

languages.text: « Je suis ici pour votre artefact, et j'exige que vous me le remettiez immédiatement. »
languages.original_text: "I have come for your artefact, and I demand that you hand it over immediately."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis ici pour votre artefact, et j'exige que vous me le remettiez immédiatement. »

languages.text: "Eserini almaya geldim. Onu derhâl teslim etmeni talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I have come for your artefact, and I demand that you hand it over immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Eserini almaya geldim. Onu derhâl teslim etmeni talep ediyorum."

languages.text: «Vengo a por su artefacto y exijo que lo entregue de inmediato».
languages.original_text: "I have come for your artefact, and I demand that you hand it over immediately."

traits.locale_text: «Vengo a por su artefacto y exijo que lo entregue de inmediato».

languages.text: "Ich bin wegen Eures Artefaktes hier und verlange, dass Ihr es mir umgehend aushändigt."
languages.original_text: "I have come for your artefact, and I demand that you hand it over immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin wegen Eures Artefaktes hier und verlange, dass Ihr es mir umgehend aushändigt."

languages.text: 「私はあなたの遺物を取りに来た。すぐに渡せ」
languages.original_text: "I have come for your artefact, and I demand that you hand it over immediately."

traits.locale_text: 「私はあなたの遺物を取りに来た。すぐに渡せ」
